summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Iteration 13 features: (1) Role-filtered dashboard stats - Supervisor sees 2 cards, GM/Owner see all 4, (2) Jobs/Alignment page toggle sections with Edit button for crew links, (3) Repeat Offenders page with collapsible heatmap, standard action tiers, and horizontal carousel, (4) Crew Capture page with separate Damage and Incident reporting sections with OSHA-compliant fields. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 validated all requested features: (1) Role-filtered dashboard - Supervisor sees only Submissions and Imported Jobs stat cards, GM and Owner see all 4 including Owner Queue and Export Ready, (2) Jobs/Alignment page has toggle-collapsible sections for Active Crew Links (open by default), Inactive Crew Links (collapsed), and Imported Jobs (collapsed), plus Edit button per crew link that opens update form, (3) Repeat Offenders page has collapsible heatmap with chevron toggle, standard courses of action card showing Watch/Warning/Critical tiers with descriptions, and horizontal carousel for crew training recommendations, (4) Create Training Session button no longer shows Copy Link - workflow directs users to Standards Library, (5) Crew Capture page has separate Damage Reporting (amber/orange) and Incident Reporting (red) sections with toggles, Incident section has OSHA-compliant fields: datetime-local input, location, injured person, body part selector, description, treatment, witness, and legal notice.

role_filtered_dashboard.supervisor_sees_2_cards: PASS - Submissions and Imported Jobs only

jobs_alignment_page.update_form_appears: PASS - Update form section appears when Edit clicked

repeat_offenders_page.copy_link_removed: PASS - No Copy Link button, workflow directs to Standards Library
